description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run the test suite that runs on push to master and on pull requests. The workflow should have three jobs: pyright, test, and coveralls. The pyright job runs on ubuntu-latest, sets up Python 3.x, installs dependencies, and runs pyright. The test job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, and windows-latest with various Python versions, installs dependencies, and runs tests with pytest and coverage. The coveralls job runs on ubuntu-latest, finishes the Coveralls report, and uploads the results.
